title: TwinHarness tier brief.json
description: Input to the Tier-0 classifier (th tier classify|veto-check). Mirrors the hand-rolled validator in src/core/brief.ts (kept in sync by tests/schemas.test.ts).

obvious_testable_answer.description: Has an obvious, testable correct answer.
